dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Important Dosage and Administration Information: ( 2.1 ) Take ezetimibe and simvastatin tablets orally once daily in the evening with or without food. Maximum recommended dosage is ezetimibe and simvastatin tablets 10 mg/40 mg once daily. Ezetimibe and simvastatin tablets 10 mg/80 mg daily dosage is restricted to patients who have been taking ezetimibe and simvastatin tablets 10 mg/80 mg daily chronically (e.g., for 12 months or more) without evidence of muscle toxici
